string 2:
Hi. How can I help you? Oh... the restroom? I'd let you in,
but I'm afraid it's in use.

Actually... it's getting to be a problem. The last customer
who went in just won't leave.

The guy's not sick, either. He keeps mumbling about a
"captain," "failure" and "revenge."
{next}That... could be someone I know.
{next}Want me to get him out?
{next}Okay. I'll wait.
Wait. Seriously?! Then tell him he needs to get out!

I may just take you up on that... He seemed scary, so I'd
rather avoid a confrontation.

A lot of other customers said the same thing, but they all
finally gave up and ran out.

I realize I'm asking a lot of you, but it'd be a huge help
if you could talk to the guy.

There's nothing more I can do. Please try to talk the
customer out of the restroom for me.

Man, this is rough. If people can't use the restroom, how
can I ask them to order more?

...all my fault... If only I were stronger... the
captain...!
Ooh, those Digimon... Damn them all!
Who keeps knocking? This restroom's occupied!
{next}You need to come out.
{next}My stomach is killing me!
{next}This is an unlawful occupation!
I don't NEED to go anywhere. Please, just leave me alone.
Sorry, but I'm not leaving. Find some other restroom.

It's not like I came in here without ordering anything.
Restrooms are for customers to use!

Wait... I know that voice! So... you came to talk to me,
knowing it was me in here, huh?

Well, you're right. It's me, Kuroi. I'm surprised you
realized who I was.
But I'm in no mood to talk to anyone right now, so get lost!
{next}Is something bothering you?
{next}Got a stomachache?
{next}You're causing trouble for the staff.

The way life's been after what happened eight years ago,
something's bothering everyone.

No, my stomach is fine. It's... somewhere higher up that
hurts.

Oh, right. In that case, I'll head out soon. Just... not
right now.
I keep thinking how the captain was fooled by Digimon...

It gets me so mad! I hate them so much, it's like a fire
burning me up inside!

That hatred keeps me going, but sometimes it can cloud my
judgment on a mission.
{next}Hatred will destroy your heart.
{next}Like what sort of mission?
{next}Stop, drop and roll doesn't help?

I'm so sick of hearing that sort of crap. It doesn't change
a thing.
What? You think I'd tell you?

...I can't tell if you're a complete idiot or if you're just
trying to lighten the mood.

Listen. I'll be piloting a new weapon soon. I volunteered,
knowing it could cost my life.

I'm taking on the captain's enemies! It'll be my way of
ending this.
{next}Hey, don't go dying out there.
{next}Please, don't get in that thing.
{next}I can't let you do that.

Those... aren't the words I expected to hear from you.
I'll... take them at face value.

Still trying, despite what I said, huh? If your concern is
for me... I appreciate it.

If you try to stop me, I'll call in backup. Please don't
make me do that.

Man, what's wrong with me? How did blabbing on like that
actually make me feel better?

Anyway, you said your piece, right? So clear out. I don't
want to see anyone right now.

And... thanks. But don't expect things to be different next
time. That'll depend on you.
I can't come out with you standing there. Leave, already.
Hey! Hold on!

That guy came out of the restroom because of what you said,
right? Thanks!

He asked me to give this to you. I told him to do it
himself, but he was already gone.
Anyway, here you go. I did my part, okay?
